name: secureintent-extension
description: Warns you before pasting API keys, tokens, or secrets into AI tools and other sites. On-device — your text never leaves the browser.
//core: Open-core seam. The pro repo consumes this barrel. Until the first premium feature ships, publishing stays off (private:true). To publish: bump version, set private:false, rename to @secureintent/core, add a build step that resolves @/ aliases (unbuild/tsup), then `pnpm publish`.

scripts.e2e:live: WXT_E2E=1 pnpm build && playwright test e2e/live.spec.ts
scripts.e2e:ui: WXT_E2E=1 pnpm build && playwright test e2e/live.spec.ts --ui
scripts.e2e: pnpm build && playwright test e2e/canary.spec.ts e2e/fallback.spec.ts
scripts.e2e:roundtrip: WXT_E2E=1 pnpm build && playwright test e2e/roundtrip.spec.ts
scripts.e2e:ghost: WXT_E2E=1 pnpm build && playwright test e2e/ghost.spec.ts
